title: Automatic barcode creation based on the column content
excerpt:
I’m looking for the solution to automatically create barcodes (simple, might be .png file) based on the column content.

posts.author: mateuszmlyniec (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for the solution to automatically create barcodes (simple, might be .png file) based on the column content.
At the moment, our team members have to manually copy the content of the column, generate the barcode and then print it on the label printer. Printing directly from the Monday would be the huge time saver!

Have you ever came across the similar problem? Maybe it’s possible through some integrations?
Thank you in advance.

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can use the Skiply app from the Marketplace https://monday.com/marketplace/14

Hope this helps

posts.author: mateuszmlyniec (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, thanks but unfortunately QR codes are not the type of barcode we need in that case.
Thank you!
